title: anthemis cotula var. cotula
intro: Anthemis cotula var. cotula, also known as dog fennel or stinking chamomile, is an annual herb in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of anthemis cotula var. cotula include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues, while also acting as a natural insect repellent. Anthemis cotula var. cotula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy for various health concerns.
